Name: UCameraAnim
Description: A predefined animation to be played on a camera

Variables.Name: CameraInterpGroup
Variables.Description: The UInterpGroup that holds our actual interpolation data.

Variables.Name: bRelativeToInitialTransform
Variables.Description:
If true, assume all transform keys are intended be offsets from the start of the animation. This allows the animation to be authored at any world location and be applied as a delta to the camera. 
	  If false, assume all transform keys are authored relative to the world origin. Positions will be directly applied as deltas to the camera.

Variables.Name: bRelativeToInitialFOV
Variables.Description:
If true, assume all FOV keys are intended be offsets from the start of the animation.
	 If false, assume all FOV keys are authored relative to the current FOV of the camera at the start of the animation.

Variables.Name: BaseFOV
Variables.Description: The base FOV that all FOV keys are relative to.

Variables.Name: BasePostProcessSettings
Variables.Description: Default PP settings to put on the animated camera. For modifying PP without keyframes.

Variables.Name: BasePostProcessBlendWeight
Variables.Description: Default PP blend weight to put on the animated camera. For modifying PP without keyframes.

Variables.Name: PreviewInterpGroup
Variables.Description: This is to preview and they only exists in editor
